question: Will Álvaro Arbeloa be sacked or resign before the end of the 2025–26 season?
reason: Álvaro Arbeloa confirmed his departure from Real Madrid after the 2025–26 season.
evidence: Arbeloa confirmed his departure after the season's final match against Athletic Club.
José Mourinho is reportedly set to replace Arbeloa as head coach.
Arbeloa stated he will not be part of Mourinho's coaching staff.
Arbeloa expressed gratitude for his time at the club and plans to seek new challenges.
Arbeloa's departure follows a season without titles and internal team tensions.
